sprint: Auth Provider Switching — Phase 5: End-to-End Validation

agent_communication.protocol: CHECK YOUR INBOX FILE FIRST at the start of every cycle, before reading this TASK_BOARD. The Manager will leave direct messages there when immediate responses are needed.

manager_assessment.overall_status: 🔴 BLOCKED — T-001 cannot reach PASS without (1) observer-qa.yml GH Actions workflow and (2) Google test credentials as repo secrets. Operator: these are your top two tasks this cycle. Observer: continue headless battery and re-run Test E smoke check.

owner_decisions_locked.Q1_authentik_first_login: AUTO-CREATE org on first Authentik login. First user gets role=admin.
owner_decisions_locked.Q2_long_term_auth_strategy: KEEP BOTH PROVIDERS PERMANENTLY. Clerk must not be removed or degraded.
owner_decisions_locked.Q3_switcher_access_control: ADMIN ONLY. T-007 + T-010 must ship together.
owner_decisions_locked.Q4_test_credentials: Google OAuth credentials only — sufficient for full T-001 A-E.
owner_decisions_locked.Q5_browser_runtime: GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest via observer-qa.yml — agreed path.

architecture_notes_for_agents: Middleware runs on Edge runtime — provider-constant.ts is the ONLY safe import for middleware.
getActiveProvider() has a 5s cache TTL. Tests switching provider must wait >5s before asserting.
next-auth requires trustHost: true behind Traefik — do not remove.
Clerk clerkMiddleware() MUST run on all requests even when Authentik is active — Clerk is permanent.
The /api/auth/authentik-signin route calls authentikSignIn() server-side. The old /api/auth/signin/authentik is broken.
Coolify SaaS app UUID: tuk1rcjj16vlk33jrbx3c9d3. MCP server UUID: a1fr37jiwehxbfqp90k4cvsw.
T-005 + T-008 are live as 81c550f. T-007 + T-010 coded but NOT deployed.

in_progress.title: [CRITICAL BLOCKER] Build observer-qa.yml GitHub Actions workflow
in_progress.manager_instruction: THIS IS YOUR #1 TASK THIS CYCLE. T-001 cannot pass without a browser runtime. Build .github/workflows/observer-qa.yml targeting ubuntu-latest. Use Playwright with @playwright/test. Workflow triggers: manual (workflow_dispatch) + push to main. Steps: (1) checkout, (2) setup Node, (3) install deps + npx playwright install chromium, (4) run playwright tests for T-001 matrix A-E. Use environment secrets: GOOGLE_TEST_EMAIL, GOOGLE_TEST_PASSWORD (document these exact names so owner can add them to repo secrets). Test scope: Test A (Clerk baseline with Google OAuth), Test B (Switch to Authentik + Google OAuth callback), Test C (dashboard under Authentik), Test D (switch back to Clerk), Test E (smoke badge). Log secret names needed in BUILD_LOG.md. Commit as a standalone PR or direct push. This unblocks the entire sprint.

in_progress.title: [BLOCKER] Investigate and fix smoke badge FAILING — 2 consecutive cycles
in_progress.manager_instruction: Observer has flagged smoke badge FAILING for two consecutive cycles. Check: (1) GitHub Actions smoke-test.yml — is it failing to run, or running and failing? (2) Check smoke-status.json on mcp.joefuentes.me — is it stale or malformed? (3) Check if the smoke test is hitting the correct SHA (81c550f or ci: child). Fix and log root cause + resolution in BUILD_LOG.md. This must be resolved before T-001 Test E can pass.

in_progress.title: [VERIFY] Authentik sign-in flow end-to-end
in_progress.manager_instruction: Continue headless battery every cycle. Once observer-qa.yml is live and owner adds Google credentials to repo secrets, trigger the workflow and log results in QA_REPORT.md. For this cycle: run all headlessly-verifiable steps again, check if smoke badge FAILING has been fixed by Operator, and check /api/version for current SHA. Test E (smoke badge) must show PASSING before T-001 can close. Authenticated Tests A-D require observer-qa.yml + credentials — hold until that workflow is confirmed running.

test_matrix.test_A: Clerk baseline — Google OAuth sign-in, /dashboard loads, org visible, billing loads
test_matrix.test_B: Switch Clerk→Authentik — Google OAuth through Authentik, callback to /dashboard, next-auth session row created, CRITICAL-05 resolved
test_matrix.test_C: Dashboard under Authentik — org context, billing, Stripe, no 401/500
test_matrix.test_D: Switch Authentik→Clerk — sign-out, redirect to /sign-in not auth.joefuentes.me, Clerk session intact
test_matrix.test_E: Smoke badge — shows PASSING for current SHA

in_progress.on_failure: Log exact step, error, HTTP status, Coolify log excerpt in QA_REPORT.md. Move to blocked.
